sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO `pm_order_data_from_erp_sap`( orderNumber ,contractNo , orderExecNumber , orderCreateTime ,customerRequireTime , customerCode ,customerName,projectName,orderComment,orderType, compCode, salesType) values
( #list[].orderNumber#,#list[].contractNo#,#list[].orderExecNumber#,#list[].orderCreateTime#,#list[].customerRequireTime#, #list[].customerCode#,#list[].customerName#,#list[].projectName#,#list[].orderComment#,#orderType#, #list[].compCode#, #list[].salesType# )

INSERT INTO `pm_order_line_from_erp_sap`(orderNumber ,lineNum ,itemCode ,itemDesc , orderQuantity ,openQuantity ,bundleCode ,warrantyMonth,lineType, compCode, profitCenter) values
( #lineList[].orderNumber#,#lineList[].lineNum#,#lineList[].itemCode#,#lineList[].itemDesc#, #lineList[].orderQuantity#,#lineList[].openQuantity#,#lineList[].bundleCode#,#lineList[].warrantyMonth#, #lineType#, #lineList[].compCode#, #lineList[].profitCenter# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT b.* from dp_reports.DP_V_SO_ORDER_4_PMS a LEFT JOIN dp_reports.DP_V_SO_LINE_4_PMS b on a.order_number = b.order_number and a.company_code = b.company_code where a.contract_number = #contractNo# and b.order_number is not null

SELECT order_number AS orderNumber, contract_number AS contractNo, order_exec_number As orderExecNumber , order_creation_date As orderCreateTime, customer_require_date AS customerRequireTime , customer_code AS customerCode, customer_name AS customerName, project_name AS projectName , comment AS orderComment , company_code AS compCode, u_sordertype AS salesType , 0 AS orderType FROM dp_reports.DP_V_SO_ORDER_4_PMS UNION ALL SELECT rma_order_number AS orderNumber, contract_number AS contractNo, order_exec_number As orderExecNumber , order_creation_date As orderCreateTime, customer_require_date AS customerRequireTime , customer_code AS customerCode, customer_name AS customerName, project_name AS projectName , comment AS orderComment , company_code AS compCode, u_sordertype AS salesType , 1 AS orderType FROM dp_reports.DP_V_RMA_ORDER_4_PMS
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO `pm_order_data_from_erp_sap`( orderNumber ,contractNo , orderExecNumber , orderCreateTime ,customerRequireTime , customerCode ,customerName,projectName,orderComment,orderType, compCode, salesType) values
( #list[].orderNumber#,#list[].contractNo#,#list[].orderExecNumber#,#list[].orderCreateTime#,#list[].customerRequireTime#, #list[].customerCode#,#list[].customerName#,#list[].projectName#,#list[].orderComment#,#list[].orderType#, #list[].compCode#, #list[].salesType# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT order_number AS orderNumber, LineNum AS lineNum, item_code AS itemCode, item_description AS itemDesc , order_quantity AS orderQuantity, open_quantity AS openQuantity , bundle_parent_item_code AS bundleCode, warranty_by_month AS warrantyMonth , company_code AS compCode, profitCenter AS profitCenter , 0 AS lineType FROM dp_reports.DP_V_SO_LINE_4_PMS UNION ALL SELECT order_number AS orderNumber, LineNum AS lineNum, item_code AS itemCode, item_description AS itemDesc , order_quantity AS orderQuantity, open_quantity AS openQuantity , bundle_parent_item_code AS bundleCode, warranty_by_month AS warrantyMonth , company_code AS compCode, profitCenter AS profitCenter , 1 AS lineType FROM dp_reports.DP_V_RMA_LINE_4_PMS
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO `pm_order_line_from_erp_sap`(orderNumber ,lineNum ,itemCode ,itemDesc , orderQuantity ,openQuantity ,bundleCode ,warrantyMonth,lineType, compCode, profitCenter) values
( #list[].orderNumber#,#list[].lineNum#,#list[].itemCode#,#list[].itemDesc#, #list[].orderQuantity#,#list[].openQuantity#,#list[].bundleCode#,#list[].warrantyMonth#, #list[].lineType#, #list[].compCode#, #list[].profitCenter# )
